snippet.title: क्या Jetha का Plan होगा कामयाब? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3118-9thMarch, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3118: Will Jetha's Plan Be Successful?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal is in the Gada household and is in talks with Champaklal and Taarak regarding the property's paper with Sunder looking over the deal. Whilst talking, Champaklal mistakenly utters the Gada surname. This forces him to weave a story of his own to remove any doubts in Bhogilal's mind. At the same time, the other members of the society and waiting for Bhogilal to fall into Jetha's trap. Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Dhee ft. Arivu - Enjoy Enjaami (Prod. Santhosh Narayanan)
snippet.description:
Enjoy Enjaami  - Available now https://music.maajja.com/enjoyenjaami

Artist: Dhee ft. Arivu
Producer: Santhosh Narayanan
Director: Amith Krishnan (Studio MOCA)
Produced by: maajja 

Music video by Dhee and Arivu performing Enjoy Enjaami. (C) 2021 maajja inc.

Follow Dhee: https://www.instagram.com/dhee___
Follow Arivu: https://www.instagram.com/therukural
Follow Santhosh Narayanan: https://www.instagram.com/musicsanthosh
Follow maajja: https://www.instagram.com/joinmaajja
Follow Studio MOCA: https://www.instagram.com/moca.studio

Lyrics:
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thaatha thaatha kala vetti
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Pondhula yaaru meen koththi
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Thanniyil odum thavalaikki
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Kambali poochi thangachi 

Allimalar kodi angadhame
Ottara ottara sandhaname
Mullai malar kodi muththaarame
Engooru engooru kuththaalame

Surukku paiyamma
Veththala mattaiyamma
Somandha kaiyamma
Maththalam kottuyamma
Thaaiyamma thaaiyamma
Enna panna maayamma 
Valliamma peraandi
Sangadhiya kellendi
Kannaadiya kaanaamdi 
Indhaarraa peraandi

Annakkili annakkili 
Adi aalamarakkela vannakkili
Nallapadi vaazhacholli 
Indha manna koduthaane
Poorvakudi
Kammaankara kaaniyellaam
Paadith thirinjaane
Aadhikkudi
Naayi nari 
Poonaikundhan
Indha erikkolam kooda sondhammadi 

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Cuckoo cuckoo...
Muttaiya podum kozhikku 
Cuckoo cuckoo...
Oppanai yaaru maiyilukku 
Cuckoo cuckoo
Pachchaiya poosum paasikku
Cuckoo cuckoo
Kuchchiya adukkuna kootukku 

Paadu patta makka 
Varappu mettukkaara
Vervathanni sokkaa 
Minukkum naattukkaara
Aakaatti karuppatti
Oodhaangolu mannuchatti
Aathoram koodukatti
Arambichcha naagareegam
Jhan jhana jhanakku jhana makkale
Uppuku chappu kottu
Muttaikulla saththukottu
Attaikku raththangkottu
Kittipullu vettu vettu

Naan anju maram valarthen...
Azhagana thottam vachchen...
Thottam sezhithaalum en thonda 
nanaiyalaye

En kadale karaye...
Vaname saname...
Nelame kolame...
Edame thadame...

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

Paattan poottan kaaththa boomi
aatam pottu kaattum saami 
Raatinandha suththi vandha
Seva koovuchu
Adhu pottu vachcha echamdhaane
Kaada maarichu
Namma naada maarichu 
Indha veeda maarichu

Enna kora enna kora
En seeni karumbukku enna kora 
Enna kora enna kora
En chella peraandikku enna kora

Pandhalulla paavarka...
Pandhalulla paavarka
Vedhakallu vitturukku...
Vedhakallu vitturukku
Appan aathaa vittadhungo
Appan aathaa vittandhungo

Ah.....

Enjoy, enjaami 
vaango vaango onnaagi
Amma yi ambaari 
Indha indha mummaari

#Dhee | #Arivu | #EnjoyEnjaami

snippet.title: Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Shivratri Special 2021 | Jamie |RaviRaj||
snippet.description:
Bholenath Ki Shadi (Official Video) Hansraj Raghuwanshi || Maha Shivratri Special 2021 || Jamie || Ravi Raj ||
हंसराज रघुवंशी ने अपने नए अंदाज में आप सबको भोलेनाथ की शादी में आने के लिए आमंत्रित किया | आप सबको इसका Teaser बहुत पसंद आया |हंसराज रघुवंशी ने भोले के प्यार में भक्ति भाव में मस्त डांस किया |  

आप सबको महाशिवरात्रि 2021 की बहुत बहुत बधाई हो | 

Produced By Bholenath ji
Song : Bholenath Ki Shadi 

Singer :   Hansraj Raghuwanshi 
https://instagram.com/baba_hans_raghu...

Video : Director Jamie 

Project by : Komal Saklani 
https://www.instagram.com/komal_saklani/​

Lyrics / Compose : Ravi Raj
Music & Mix : Zakir
Audio Mastered : Amit Monga
DOP : James
Choreography  : Shaiman
Makeup : Nishu
Art : Sunny
Publicity Design :  G Dhillon

Digital Partner : Fatafat Digital
https://www.instagram.com/fatafat_dig...

Listen this song on various audio platforms
https://www.hungama.com/album/bholenath-ki-shaadi/63340083/
https://wynk.in/music/album/bholenath-ki-shaadi/hu_8903246165347
https://gaana.com/album/bholenath-ki-shaadi
https://www.boomplay.com/songs/56019390?srModel=COPYLINK&srList=WEB
https://open.spotify.com/track/0dvnp7suFGS3AJZLMPHqAT?si=7a187440c103480f
Come join me on Resso to listen to Bholenath Ki Shaadi by Hans Raj Raghuwanshi! 
https://m.resso.app/ZSJLqUFee/

Special Thanks : Abhi,Pankaj,Rahul Puri,Novi,Rohit etc.

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

snippet.title: My first VLOG ENJOYED IN KASHMIR
snippet.description:
I had been longing to travel since a long time now, I recently had an opportunity to travel to one of the most beautiful places in our country for work, and I must say it was a wonderful experience, not just because of the place but also because of the people I had the chance to work with, souls as beautiful as the place.

Some of you had suggested me to make a vlog... so here’s a little something that I have complied from my last trip to Kashmir. 
Please have a look and let me know if you like it. Your feedback means a lot ♥️

snippet.title: Akhaa Vich: Sonu Kakkar | Paras Kalnawat, Anagha Bhosale | New Hindi Song 2021 | Romantic Love Songs
snippet.description:
Voilà! Digi presents 'Akhaa Vich', sung by Sonu Kakkar and starring Paras Kalnawat & Anagha Bhosale. ‘Akhaa Vich’ is a cute romantic song dedicated by a girl to the love of her life where she is saying that the guy is fixed in her eyes in such a way that she can’t imagine her life with anybody else.

Watch the Latest promo of the Tamil Serial #Chithi 2 that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @10.00 PM on Sun TV. 

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. snippet.title: Bhogilal पहुँचा Gokuldham - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3117 - 8th March, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/bhogilal-arrives-1000110505?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3117: Bhogilal Reaches Gokuldham
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhogilal has finally arrived at Gokuldham with Jethalal's trap in place. Bhogilal is stalled by Taarak and Sunder at the doorstep of Jethalal's house. Over there, Taarak is introduced to Bhogilal as Champaklal's accountant. All of them make their way to the Gada household where the other society members are awaiting him. What will happen now? Will Jetha's plan move ahead smoothly? Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: भारत की आल-राउंड जीत vs आयरलैंड | 2011 विश्व कप
snippet.description:
2011 क्रिकेट विश्व कप में भारत ने आयरलैंड के खिलाफ बेहतरीन पाँच-विकेट जीत दर्ज की थी। मज़ा उठाएं इस मैच की हाइलाइट्स का हिंदी कमेंटरी के साथ।

और हिंदी के पोस्ट्स के लिए शामिल हो जाएँ हमारे हिंदी फेसबुक ग्रुप में 👉 https://bit.ly/YTFBHindi

localized.title: भारत की आल-राउंड जीत vs आयरलैंड | 2011 विश्व कप

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021
 
Watch Chithi 2 Mon-Sat @10.00 PM on Sun TV.

snippet.title: Gaana Challe Ya Na | Jasmine Sandlas | Official Music Video | Latest Punjabi Songs 2021
snippet.description:
Song Name: Gaana Challe Ya Na
Lyrics and Singer: Jasmine Sandlas
Director: Rosleen Sandlas
Music, Mixing & Mastering: Sharan Shergill
DOP & Editor: Guri Bhandal
Colorist: Gobindpuriya
Makeup: Mia Lopez

I wrote this song in the depths of solitude. I was surrounded by darkness and confusion. This song is about self doubt and fear of failure. In a cold world, this melody came to me like a warm hug. I hope you feel what I felt when I wrote it. I should speak no more.

Available on all Digital Platforms

Spotify: https://rb.gy/m0vek4
Apple Music: https://rb.gy/ftvsom
Gaana: https://rb.gy/p2zjob
Amazon Music: https://rb.gy/cbmpa1

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1190 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
As Heer and Virat come together after a long time to live as husband and wife, Heer's decision to undergo gender reassignment surgery leaves Virat fuming. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Poles Apart - Webseries Trailer Ft. Tanya Singh | Abhishek Kapoor | Hasley  Originals
snippet.description:
Poles apart is a story of two individuals who are like the land and sky. This is an ode to a unique relationship journey of a couple which makes them stand 'Poles Apart'!

Hasley Original's new webshow is filled with fun, entertainment, tears and obviously DOSTI! And a little action..

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Ep. 1190 | Virat Comes To Heer'S Rescue
snippet.description:
Angel leaves Harak Singh and the rest of his family helpless as she drags Heer out to take her along. However, the situation changes for Angel when she gets slapped by Virat as she comes out of the house. How will Angel retaliate to this insult?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26Kt-V0yTlZzY3RFB0Equyf1h

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Throwback - Episode 425 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Poove Unakkaga - Promo | 09 March 2021 | Sun TV Serial | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #PooveUnakkaga that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Mar 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: Hotstar Specials OK Computer | Trailer I Vijay Varma, Radhika Apte, Jackie Shroff, Anand Gandhi
snippet.description:
We have stone age emotions, industrial age institutions and space age technology - how are we going to reconcile our intentions with a future that arrives faster than we can imagine it? In the absence of legal or moral precedents for crimes committed by Artificial Intelligence, who does the justice system frame charges against? Errant technology or its human inventors?

 Hotstar Specials presents Ok Computer, all episodes streaming from Mar 26 

Created and Directed by: Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar
Produced by: Anand Gandhi, Pooja Shetty & Neil Pagedar

snippet.title: Kanyadaan - Full Episode | 7 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Kanyadaan" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: उपवास असो वा नसो करून पहा असे कुरकुरीत आणि टम्म फुगलेले साबुदाणा वडे आणि सोबत उपवासाची चटणी
snippet.description:
#SabudanaVade #UpvasRecipe #साबुदाणावडे
साबुदाणा वडे कुरकुरीत कमी तेलकट होण्यासाठी खास टिप्स या व्हिडिओ मध्ये सांगितलेल्या आहेत. वड्यांसोबत खाण्यासाठी उपवासाची चटणी देखील केली आहे. असे साबुदाणा वडे आणि चटणी खाण्यासाठी उपवास करायलाच हवा असे नाही केव्हाही करू शकता 
साहित्य 
१ कप साबुदाणा 
हिरवी मिरची ठेचा 
२ मोठे उकडलेले बटाटे 
१/२ कप भाजलेल्या शेंगदाण्याचा कूट 
१/४ कप ओल्या नारळाचा किस 
मीठ 
चटणीसाठी 
ओला नारळाचे काप 
हिरवी मिरची 
२ चमचे दही 
मीठ 
साखर
********************

उपवास कचोरी https://youtu.be/JkPO7GC1XCk

snippet.title: Chanda Jhaanke - Official Video | Hansraj Raghuwanshi | Salim Sulaiman | Shradha | Merchant Records
snippet.description:
'Chanda Jhaanke' is a devotional track but with a new-age sound crafted by Salim Sulaiman and has an infectious World music rhythm. 

The powerful vocals of Hansraj Raghuwanshi & Salim Merchant add a rich tint of folk with multiple Indian instruments enhancing the folk vibe of the song! Shradha Pandit has written the song in a poetic way that makes it more relatable to non-religious listeners as well. The ending of the song talks about different names for Lord Shiva.

🎧 Listen to & Download "Chanda Jhaanke" on:

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/5X3oePi6rfWKfwwcAbjXQL?si=U3Weemg-Q_WckZkDjcsVag

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/chanda-jhaanke-single/1555674482

Gaana: https://gaana.com/song/chanda-jhaanke

JioSaavn: https://www.saavn.com/s/song/hindi/Chanda-Jhaanke/Chanda-Jhaanke/BAASQAIHZ18

Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.in/albums/B08XLXK8MR?marketplaceId=A3K6Y4MI8GDYMT&musicTerritory=IN&trackAsin=B08XLWBQH2

Hungama: https://www.hungama.com/song/chanda-jhaanke/63302657/

Wynk: https://wynk.in/u/OJxAXMZYm

snippet.title: Oprah interview: Racism claims, Harry 'let down' by dad, and Meghan on Kate 🔴 @BBC News live - BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube 👉 https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer 👉 https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

🔘 Subscribe and 🔔 @BBC News 👉 https://bit.ly/3a1zyip
🔘 Stream BBC News live on BBC iPlayer 🔴 https://bbc.in/3b64IVP
🔘 Coronavirus / Covid-19 👉 https://bbc.in/3luQp33
🔘 Follow BBC News live updates here 👉 https://bbc.in/2JmUswL

It's Monday 8 March 2021. Our top stories this morning 0:00

The Duke and Duchess of Sussex's much-anticipated interview with Oprah Winfrey has aired in the US - with the couple sharing their side of the story about life in the Royal Family.

The couple spoke about their relationships with other royals, racism and how their mental health suffered.

Meghan spoke with Oprah for most of the interview, before being joined by Prince Harry.

Get the full story 👉 http://bbc.in/3rqBdH3

After the teasing clips, the full interview between the Duke and Duchess of Sussex and Oprah Winfrey was shown last night in the US. Oprah with Meghan and Harry: A Primetime Special, is produced by Harpo Productions

Follow the story 👉 https://bbc.in/3bnQe6D

Get the latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team live on iPlayer daily from 6am.

BBC Breakfast | BBC News | BBC

#BBC #BBCiPlayer #BBCNews #BBCNewsLive #BBCCoronavirus #Coronavirus #Covid-19 #CoronavirusOutbreak #Corona #CoronavirusUK

All our TV channels and S4C are available to watch live through BBC iPlayer, although some programmes may not be available to stream online due to rights. snippet.title: Trailer : #InfinityPlatter YouTube Channel || Aashritha Daggubati
snippet.description:
Aashritha , a self taught baker, food & travel blogger, currently living in Barcelona, Spain. 
While she have roots in South India- she plan to explore the culinary arts, the people behind them and see the world while doing it. Along the way she'll look at easy recipes, restaurants, chefs and local cuisines.
